title: Allium+
description: This mod adds new powerful items made of Allium and two new crazy mobs
body:
This mod was made as commission and allowed to be released in public. All the ideas are not mine, I did only textures and mod itself

 

This mod adds new powerful items made of Allium and two new crazy mobs

 

Subscribe on mod's platforms:

Discord Server

YouTube

Telegram channel

Wiki

VK (Russian) 

 

The mod contain:
- Allium Ingot. Made by smelting Allium. Have Block and Nugget variants. Can be used as trimming material
- Allium Tools: Sword (6 damage), Pickaxe (5 damage, can break the blocks that Diamond Pickaxe can), Axe (9 damage), Shovel (2 damage) and Hoe (3 damage)

 


- Allium Armor that have the defense between Iron Armor and Diamond (Helmet - 3 defense, Chestplate - 7, Leggings - 5, Boots - 2). All the pieces have 1 Armor Toughness. Can be trimmed with Armor Trims
- Allium Shield with 1561 durability

 


- Allium Book that tells the story of this mod
- Allium Totem that could be used as Totem of Undying preventing death from fatal damage. Crafts from Emerald, Diamond, Allium, Golden Ingot and Lapis Lazuli
- Golden Allium. Crafts from Allium and 8 Golden Nuggets and adds Golden Apple effects: Absorption (01:00) and Regeneration II (00:05)

 


- Cornflower Potion and it's Splash varians. Made by brewing Cornflower and adds Poison (00:09), Slowness (00:09), Blindness (00:09) and Weakness (00:09)

 

- Allium Block can be used as Beacon base block and also Allium Ingot can be used as Beacon payment item

 

- Beebav Boss that spawns in the same biomes as usual Bees spawns. Have 350 HP and 4 attack damage. Adds Poison (00:09) when attacking. Drops Honeycomb and 4 Alliums

- Chicken Jack. New mob that spawns anywhere on Grass Block. Have 450 HP and 3 attack damage. Drops 4 Chicken, Egg and Cornflower

- Also this mod have 10 new advancements


Mod changes some vanilla items:
- Allium now could be eaten and restores full hunger bar
- Cornflower now could be eaten and adds Poison (00:09)
